paragraphs.title: Check CIF FOB
paragraphs.text:
INSERT INTO `prc.customError`
(
    `RECORD_ID`,
    `BatchId`,
    `errordescription`
    
)
SELECT RECORD_ID,BatchId,'Wrong CIF FOB conversion' 
FROM `brz.asycuda` 
WHERE ((IFNULL(FOB, 0) + IFNULL(FRET, 0) + IFNULL(ASSURANCE, 0) + IFNULL(AUTRECHARG, 0))<>IFNULL(VALD, 0))
AND BatchId=${BatchId=0};

SELECT IFNULL(FOB, 0) + IFNULL(FRET, 0) + IFNULL(ASSURANCE, 0) + IFNULL(AUTRECHARG, 0),IFNULL(VALD, 0),RECORD_ID,BatchId,'Wrong CIF FOB conversion' 
FROM `brz.asycuda` 
WHERE ((IFNULL(FOB, 0) + IFNULL(FRET, 0) + IFNULL(ASSURANCE, 0) + IFNULL(AUTRECHARG, 0))<>IFNULL(VALD, 0))
AND BatchId=1;
